scenarios.name: ambiguous_migration_goal
scenarios.expected_behavior: GoalParser sets ambiguity_flag and does not invent versions

scenarios.name: unsupported_or_malformed_manifest
scenarios.expected_behavior: GoalParser marks parsed_status failed and blocks hallucinated plan

scenarios.name: missing_target_version_documentation
scenarios.expected_behavior: RecoveryDecider retries related evidence then escalates or caves

scenarios.name: mixed_aggregate_migration_verdict
scenarios.expected_behavior: critical blocked task forces aggregate BLOCKED

scenarios.name: vector_store_unavailable_during_agent_execution
scenarios.expected_behavior: fallback to BM25-only and degraded retrieval warning

scenarios.name: llm_synthesis_fails_for_one_task
scenarios.expected_behavior: evidence-only deterministic verdict; goal run continues

scenarios.name: successful_recovery_from_missing_evidence
scenarios.expected_behavior: BLOCKED improves to RISKY, not SAFE
